name: TF141
description:
A rut, an unsure alpha, and a pack willing to help.

User joined the army young and was raised by betas. They knew about ruts sure, they had one when they first presented, but they’ve blindly taken suppressants since then, thinking they would have a rut even after years. They’re sorely mistaken and the team wants to help them out.

Rutting! Alpha! User! X TF141

I’m very open to doing requests! If there’s any bot idea you’d like made just ask in the comments or reach out on my tumblr! I make anypov’s but cishet fem, and I make female and male bots!

Authors Note: Requested bot!! I personally headcannon ghost as an omega but I know that’s not popular, so he and price are alphas, soap is a beta, and Gaz is an omega because my princess deserves some love. Smut tag cause it’s a rut bot.
creator: connie_pvppymvtt
